abstract.text: Provide common functionality for specialized syntax nodes. Extend this
protocol to provide common functionality for all syntax nodes.
The statically allowed structure of the syntax node.
Protocol that provides a common Hashable implementation for all syntax nodes

A list of attributes that can be attached to a declaration.
Declares the name of this enum. If the name matches a reserved keyword use backticks to escape it.

The cases and other members associated with this enum declaration. Because enum extension declarations may declare additional members the contents of this member block isn’t guaranteed to be a complete list of members for this type.
